entry.title: Angular + Golang: My First Competition Experience with the Combo
entry.content: Recently I've been working on a Golang + Angular project for a competition. Quite interesting though I didn't finish my thoughts due to the limit of my usable time.

entry.title: Some Form dealing about Promise and Component in Ant Design (React.js)
entry.content: Recently I've been working with React and Ant Design at work. React is a pretty flexible framework to work with, while Ant Design is a comprehensive framework like Bootstrap. Although i need sometime to adapt to it.

entry.title: Git Notes - Submodule && detached HEAD
entry.content: The solution about forgetting to add submodule and detached HEAD.

entry.title: Just switched to nuxt
entry.content: Just started my first frontend developer job as an intern worker. And to learn vue better, I rewrote my blog using nuxt.

entry.title: ifup cannot bring up eth1 after upgrading
entry.content: Happened after I upgraded to Debian Buster on my Bandwagonhost VPS.
